_meta.author: ruixen.ui
_meta.title: Notifications Toggle
_meta.description: This Lucide-based Notifications component is a clean, professional solution for handling user alerts with both dark and light theme support. It offers two distinct views inside a popover: a carousel mode, where users can browse notifications one at a time with smooth navigation controls, and a vertical list mode, which displays multiple notifications in a scrollable stack. Each notification includes a Lucide icon, title, description, and timestamp, providing clear context without relying on colors or emojis.
